description_long: This is a modern beverage vending machine with a rectangular, upright form and a predominantly white exterior. The front face features three rows of colorful drink bottles and cans, each clearly visible behind a transparent display window illuminated by internal lighting. Below the product display are various functional components, including a digital display panel, a payment interface with coin and bill slots, a card reader, and a product retrieval slot. The sides and back of the machine are plain, smooth, and metallic gray, with no visible openings or features. The machine is designed to be placed against a wall or in open public spaces, providing easy access to refreshments. Its robust construction suggests it is built to withstand frequent use in urban environments.
description: A white, rectangular beverage vending machine with a transparent, illuminated front display showing colorful drinks, and a control/payment panel below. The sides and back are plain metallic gray, emphasizing its sturdy, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the illuminated product display with rows of drinks, a digital display, payment slots, selection buttons, and a retrieval slot.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, smooth metallic gray surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a flat, featureless metallic gray panel, emphasizing the machine's boxy shape.
description_view_3: The right side view is identical to the left, showing a plain, smooth metallic gray surface.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular illuminated display panel is located on the upper front, above the payment interface, showing product information and possibly digital instructions.
attribute_payment_interface: The payment interface includes a coin slot, bill acceptor, and card reader, all located on the right side of the front panel below the product display.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: Individual rectangular selection buttons are arranged in rows below each product, clearly labeled and placed directly beneath the corresponding drink.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, horizontal retrieval slot with a flap is located at the lower front of the machine, below the payment and selection interface.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Branding is visible on the front, including a logo and product images above the retrieval slot, with additional colorful signage on the product display window.
